label: Y2K
summary: Millennium chrome: dark navy dither page, banded silver panels, Impact headings.
era: The turn-of-the-century tech portal, brushed metal, cyan glow, install CDs.
a11y: Every body-text pair passes WCAG AA (validated by scripts/contrast.mjs). The blue accent is chrome only; body links take a silver-safe blue on the sheet and a bright cyan on the dark page, always underlined.
